untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires identification of specific geometric formations (horizontal support line, up-sloping trend line, expanding price range with minor highs/lows). These require trend line fitting and multi-point pattern recognition which cannot be expressed using only point-in-time indicator comparisons. The signal requires visual/structural pattern analysis rather than oscillator or moving average logic.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using Donchian channels for breakout detection and volume confirmation, but this does not capture the core megaphone pattern geometry requirement. The original signal fundamentally requires pattern recognition algorithms to identify the specific formation shape, which is outside the scope of simple indicator-based rules.
